stem: A pupil is revising the difference between variables and constants.
review_notes: Free-typed cloze with no visible bank. Accept lists use lowercase canonical form; trimWhitespace defaults true.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Type the missing word into each gap.

part_config.text: A named store whose value can change while the program is running is called a {{g1}}. A named store whose value is fixed for the whole program is called a {{g2}}. The symbol used to give a value to one of these stores is called the {{g3}} operator.
